title: Smoky Tomato Soup
excerpt: Ingredients 10 ml oil 1 onion, finely chopped 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped 5 ml whole cumin 4 vegetable stock cubes 750 ml boiling water 30 ml smoked paprika 5 ml sugar 2 cans cherry tomatoes 1 x 410 g can tomato purée salt and pepper 500 ml cream basil leaves for garnish Method Heat the oil in …
html:
Ingredients

  • 10 ml oil
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 2 garlic cloves, finely chopped
  • 5 ml whole cumin
  • 4 vegetable stock cubes
  • 750 ml boiling water
  • 30 ml smoked paprika
  • 5 ml sugar
  • 2 cans cherry tomatoes
  • 1 x 410 g can tomato purée
  • salt and pepper
  • 500 ml cream
  • basil leaves for garnish

Method

Heat the oil in a pot and fry the onion, garlic and cumin until the onions are translucent.

Dissolve the vegetable stock cubes in the boiling water and set aside.

Add the smoked paprika, sugar, cherry tomatoes and tomato purée to the onion mixture. Heat until it starts to simmer, add the vegetable stock and cook for 10 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper.

Blend the soup, stir in the cream and let it just come back to a simmer.

Serve with a basil leaf as garnish.

Makes 6 servings with a warm fresh bread roll.

Easy!
